race.comment: JOLIESTAR (6) indicated she was back to her brilliant best when showing an explosive turn of foot to put them away in the G2 Expressway Stakes over 1200m at this track. Gets map favours with fitness on her side and can keep the winning momentum going. LADY SHENANDOAH (7) good fresh mare looking for this distance and further now. Likely to go back from the draw after charging late with a fighting first-up third over 1200m in the G2 Expressway Stakes. Top-three contender. NAPOLEONIC (9) has a fitness edge over the bulk of these third-up. Failed to run out a strong 1400m when peaked late to run second in the G2 Hobartville at Rosehill. Lloyd sticks and can give his older rivals a real fight. LINEBACKER (3) Silver Eagle winner over this trip in the Spring resuming. Primed with the two searching trials and not to be underestimated at the good each way price. GRINGOTTS (1) likely to drift back and adept in all conditions. Stays in the mix.
